ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds or kilograms */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "draft_info" TEXT /* Draft information of the player (e.g., round, pick number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, championship) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "pim" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are for */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "g" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "a" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "pim" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "ppg" INTEGER /* Power play goals by the player */,
  "ppa" INTEGER /* Power play assists by the player */,
  "shg" INTEGER /* Shorthanded goals by the player */,
  "sha" INTEGER /* Shorthanded assists by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, coach, league administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistics being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the statistics */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES season_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a league administrator */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the administrator is responsible for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the administrator's term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the administrator's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team staff member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coach, trainer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the staff member's term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the staff member's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
